scripts.start:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development tsc && concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=development tsc --watch" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon dist/index.js"
scripts.start:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsc && concurrently "cross-env NODE_ENV=production tsc --watch" "cross-env NODE_ENV=production nodemon dist/index.js"
